slides.title: Making Your Own Rules 📜
slides.content:
## errors.New

Sometimes, the built-in functions don't perfectly describe what went wrong in *your* specific app (like "Insufficient funds" or "User not found"). 

You can create simple custom errors using the `errors.New()` function.

slides.title: Returning an Error ↩️
slides.content: To return an error from a function, add `error` to the return types.
